Generic.expected: Flexible Feudal pressure or a standard Fast Castle setup.
Generic.scout: Scout early military buildings, gold timing and wall progress.
Generic.counter: Stay active with small army, keep walls tidy and choose the counter unit after scouting.

Romans.expected: Infantry pressure into strong Castle Age infantry or a compact Fast Castle.
Romans.scout: Watch for early barracks activity and fast blacksmith upgrades.
Romans.counter: Use archers, walls and clean focus fire; avoid taking long melee fights without upgrades.

Berbers.expected: Scout opening into cheap Castle Age knights or camel pressure.
Berbers.scout: Check stable timing, gold count and whether they add a second stable.
Berbers.counter: Add spears early, wall resource edges and prepare monks or camels for Castle Age.

Malians.expected: Flexible militia, archers or scouts backed by a smooth economy.
Malians.scout: Identify the first production building quickly; Malians can pivot easily.
Malians.counter: Do not overcommit blind; defend the first unit line and keep scouting for the tech switch.

Georgians.expected: Fast scouts with mule-cart economy into cavalry pressure.
Georgians.scout: Look for stable timing and how many scouts are actually committed.
Georgians.counter: Small walls plus spears buy time; punish if they spend too little time in Feudal.

Tatars.expected: Archers or scouts into strong hill control and cavalry archers later.
Tatars.scout: Check range versus stable and respect elevated fights.
Tatars.counter: Fight off hills, add skirms versus archers and keep mobility ready for Castle Age.

Cumans.expected: Feudal boom with second TC or heavy Feudal military.
Cumans.scout: Confirm second TC immediately; the response changes completely.
Cumans.counter: If second TC appears, pressure hard before the economy pays off; otherwise defend standard Feudal.

Shu.scout: Track barracks count and early blacksmith upgrades.
Shu.counter: Archers and walls are the clean first answer; avoid idle TC while defending.

Bohemians.expected: Defensive economy into strong monks, siege or gunpowder timings.
Bohemians.scout: Watch gold, stone and fast Castle indicators.
Bohemians.counter: Pressure before the tech mass; use mobility and avoid slow fights into siege.

Muisca.expected: Demo data: mixed Feudal pressure into economy scaling.
Muisca.scout: Confirm whether the first building is range, stable or defensive market play.
Muisca.counter: Keep the opening flexible and choose skirms, spears or scouts after the first scout pass.

Wei.expected: Demo data: cavalry or infantry pressure with a strong timing window.
Wei.scout: Track stable, barracks and gold commitment.
Wei.counter: Use small walls and the correct trash counter while preparing a Castle Age answer.

Hindustanis.expected: Strong economy into camels, hand cannons or flexible Feudal play.
Hindustanis.scout: Watch gold timing and whether they open scouts or archers.
Hindustanis.counter: Avoid knight-only plans; use archers, pikes, monks or your own ranged power.

Sicilians.expected: Scouts, defensive boom or Serjeant/donjon pressure.
Sicilians.scout: Check for forward villagers and stone commitment.
Sicilians.counter: Deny forward buildings early; use ranged units and avoid inefficient trash fights.

Burgundians.expected: Greedy eco upgrades into cavalry or a strong Castle Age economy.
Burgundians.scout: Look for early eco upgrades, stable timing and fast Castle greed.
Burgundians.counter: Pressure greed, keep spears ready and do not let them reach a free boom uncontested.
